title: Site Plan
description: Phase 2 Plan artefact: chosen Scaffold + Variant + route plan + selected Dossiers + BuildSpec. Locked by ADR 0013 before Sprint 2B wires planningModel.

runId.description: Engine Run identifier the plan belongs to.

scaffoldVersion.description: Optional scaffold version pin. Useful when the same scaffoldId is migrated across versions.

variantId.description: Chosen Variant identifier within the scaffold (e.g. 'nordic-trust').

routePlan.description: Routes that should exist in the generated site, in order.

selectedDossiers.description: Active Dossiers for this run. Either a flat list of IDs (legacy mock) or an object split into required / recommended / conditional buckets. The object form may carry a free-form rationale string copied from Project Input for traceability.

qualityTarget.description: Target page-quality score from page-quality-traits.v1.json. Default 9.0.

verificationPolicy.description: How strict the build verification is in this run.

previewRuntime.description: Preview Runtime to use after the run. Names match preview-runtime-policy.v1.json.

pageIntentWarnings.description: Non-blocking warnings for wizard must-have pages that imply a route path not present in the selected scaffold route plan.

pageCountWarning.description: Non-blocking warning emitted by produce_site_plan when site_brief.pageCount caused routePlan to be trimmed or clamped to the minimum runnable set. Absent when no trim occurred (B138).

requestedPageCount.description: Page count the brief carried (operator's explicit number from the free prompt).

scaffoldDefaultCount.description: Number of routes the selected scaffold's defaultRoutes would emit untrimmed.

emittedRouteCount.description: Number of routes actually emitted after trim/clamp. Always >= 2 (home + contact).

reason.description: Why the warning was emitted. trimmed-to-brief-page-count: brief.pageCount < scaffold defaults, route_plan trimmed. below-minimum-keeping-default: brief.pageCount < 2, clamped to minimum runnable set (home + contact).

sourceModelRole.description: Locked: this artefact is always attributed to the planningModel role even while the plan is mock.

modelUsed.description: Concrete model identifier (e.g. 'gpt-5.4') or 'mock' when fallback / pre-Sprint-2B stub ran.

planSource.description: Truth field about which code path produced this plan. Mirrors briefSource on Site Brief. 'pinned' means a Project Input pre-selected scaffold/variant and planningModel was not asked to choose (Sprint 2B builder path). 'mock-pre-sprint-2b' is retained for historical artefakts written before produce_site_plan() landed.

planError.description: Error message when planSource indicates a fallback path. Null otherwise.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the plan was written.
